# MC68000 Opcode Test Suite (MicroCore Labs)

This folder contains the MC68000 opcode test suite by **Ted Fried / MicroCore Labs**.

- Original repository: https://github.com/MicroCoreLabs/Projects
- Source folder: https://github.com/MicroCoreLabs/Projects/tree/master/MCL68/MC68000_Test_Code

The files in this directory are included **unmodified** for emulator validation purposes.

Included files:

- `Test_Suite.bin`
- `MC68000_test_all_opcodes.L68`
- `MC68000_test_all_opcodes.S68`
- `MC68000_test_all_opcodes.X68`
